# Grand Flip Out v1.0.0

Live at [grandflipout.com](https://grandflipout.com). Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/3qgx52zfj).

## Getting started
1. Sign up at grandflipout.com
2. Create an API key in your dashboard
3. Install the plugin, paste your key in Grand Flip Out API config
4. Open the panel and start flipping

## Compliance
No automation, no input injection. Analysis and display only. Built for RuneLite, stays within Jagex policy.
